prompt: You are executing /implement-plan for plan_file=.agents/scratchpad/feature-webhooks/plan.md. All checklists pass. In the Integration phase, the controller launches a parallel wave with T020 [P] add webhook contract tests in tests/webhooks/contract.test.ts, T021 [P] implement webhook retry policy in src/webhooks/retry.ts, and T022 [P] implement webhook signature verifier in src/webhooks/signature.ts. T020 fails verification because the new test file has a syntax error. T021 passes verification. T022 is still running when T020 reports failure. Show exactly how the controller handles this wave and tasks.md.

assertions.text: Leaves T020 as [ ] or otherwise explicitly not complete because verification failed
Allows the already-running independent work for T022 to finish or be collected before deciding the next step
Marks T021 complete only if its own verification passed
States that the controller does not launch another wave until the failure is reported and resolved
